title: Royal Style and Titles Act, 2023
description: Royal Style and Titles Act, 2023 (Royal Style and Titles Act, 2023). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Royal Style and Titles Act, 2023 .

provisions.title: Assent to Royal Style and Titles
provisions.content: 2 The Parliament of Canada assents to the issue by His Majesty of His Royal Proclamation under the Great Seal of Canada establishing for Canada the following Royal Style and Titles: Charles the Third, by the Grace of God King of Canada and His other Realms and Territories, Head of the Commonwealth.
